creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
Then build with: ECDSA, GOST, THREADS
Segmentation fault - always.
without all options Segmentation fault only unbound-anchor.


truss /usr/local/sbin/unbound-anchor
....
open("/usr/local/etc/unbound/root.key",O_RDONLY,0666) = 3 (0x3)

SIGNAL 11 (SIGSEGV)
process exit, rval = 0



gdb /usr/local/sbin/unbound-anchor ./unbound-anchor.core
